security.getUser: SELECT user_id, user_na, user_pw, status_id FROM "user" WHERE user_na = $1 AND user_pw = $2
security.insertUser: INSERT INTO "user" (user_na, user_pw, status_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING user_id
security.listUsers: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_na, s.status_id, s.status_de, COALESCE(string_agg(p.profile_de, ', ' ORDER BY p.profile_id), '—') AS profiles FROM "user" u INNER JOIN status s ON s.status_id = u.status_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN profile p ON p.profile_id = up.profile_id GROUP BY u.user_id, u.user_na, s.status_id, s.status_de ORDER BY u.user_id ASC
security.listProfiles: SELECT profile_id, profile_de FROM profile ORDER BY profile_id ASC
security.listUserProfiles: SELECT p.profile_id, p.profile_de FROM user_profile up INNER JOIN profile p ON p.profile_id = up.profile_id WHERE up.user_id = $1 ORDER BY p.profile_id ASC
security.listAccessibleSubsystems: SELECT DISTINCT s.sub_system_id, s.sub_system_de FROM sub_system s WHERE s.sub_system_id IN (SELECT o.sub_system_id FROM object o INNER JOIN method m ON m.object_id = o.object_id INNER JOIN permission_method pm ON pm.method_id = m.method_id WHERE pm.profile_id = $1 UNION SELECT op.sub_system_id FROM option op INNER JOIN permission_option po ON po.option_id = op.option_id WHERE po.profile_id = $1) ORDER BY s.sub_system_de
security.addUserProfile: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (user_id, profile_id) DO NOTHING
security.removeUserProfile: DELETE FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = $1 AND profile_id = $2
security.listPermissionMethods: SELECT m.method_id, m.method_de, o.object_de, s.sub_system_de, (pm.permission_method_id IS NOT NULL) AS granted, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total FROM method m INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = m.object_id INNER JOIN sub_system s ON s.sub_system_id = o.sub_system_id LEFT JOIN permission_method pm ON pm.method_id = m.method_id AND pm.profile_id = $1 WHERE ($2 = '' OR (s.sub_system_de || ' ' || o.object_de || ' ' || m.method_de) ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%') ORDER BY s.sub_system_de, o.object_de, m.method_id LIMIT $3 OFFSET $4
security.isPermissionMethod: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM method m INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = m.object_id WHERE m.method_id = $1 AND o.object_de = 'Permission') AS is_perm
security.grantMethod: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (profile_id, method_id) DO NOTHING
security.revokeMethod: DELETE FROM permission_method WHERE profile_id = $1 AND method_id = $2
security.insertProfile: INSERT INTO profile (profile_de) VALUES ($1) RETURNING profile_id
security.updateProfile: UPDATE profile SET profile_de = $2 WHERE profile_id = $1
security.countProfileUsers: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n FROM user_profile WHERE profile_id = $1
security.listPermissionOptions: SELECT op.option_id, op.option_de, s.sub_system_de, (po.permission_option_id IS NOT NULL) AS granted FROM option op INNER JOIN sub_system s ON s.sub_system_id = op.sub_system_id LEFT JOIN permission_option po ON po.option_id = op.option_id AND po.profile_id = $1 ORDER BY op.option_id
security.grantOption: INSERT INTO permission_option (profile_id, option_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (profile_id, option_id) DO NOTHING
security.revokeOption: DELETE FROM permission_option WHERE profile_id = $1 AND option_id = $2
security.getOptionDe: SELECT option_de FROM option WHERE option_id = $1
security.listAudit: SELECT a.id, to_char(a.date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS date, to_char(a.hour, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS hour, a.action, a.description, u.user_na FROM audit a INNER JOIN "user" u ON u.user_id = a.user_id ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT $1

proyectos.listProyects: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status_id, s.status_de, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg(pe.person_na || ' ' || pe.person_ln, ', ') FROM proyect_role pr INNER JOIN proyect_role_person prp ON prp.proyect_role_id = pr.id INNER JOIN person pe ON pe.person_id = prp.person_id WHERE pr.proyect_id = p.id AND pr.name = 'Líder'), '—') AS leader_na, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM proyect_role pr2 INNER JOIN proyect_role_person prp2 ON prp2.proyect_role_id = pr2.id WHERE pr2.proyect_id = p.id) AS members FROM proyect p INNER JOIN status s ON s.status_id = p.status_id ORDER BY p.id DESC
proyectos.listProyectMembers: SELECT prp.id, pr.name AS role_de, pe.person_id, pe.person_na, pe.person_ln, COALESCE(c.name, '—') AS charge_de FROM proyect_role pr INNER JOIN proyect_role_person prp ON prp.proyect_role_id = pr.id INNER JOIN person pe ON pe.person_id = prp.person_id LEFT JOIN charge c ON c.id = pe.charge_id WHERE pr.proyect_id = $1 ORDER BY pr.name, pe.person_na
proyectos.listPersons: SELECT pe.person_id, pe.person_ci, pe.person_na, pe.person_ln, COALESCE(c.name, '—') AS charge_de FROM person pe LEFT JOIN charge c ON c.id = pe.charge_id ORDER BY pe.person_na, pe.person_ln
proyectos.getProyect: SELECT id, name, status_id FROM proyect WHERE id = $1
proyectos.insertProyect: INSERT INTO proyect (status_id, name) VALUES ($1, $2) RETURNING id
proyectos.setProyectStatus: UPDATE proyect SET status_id = $2 WHERE id = $1
proyectos.findProyectRole: SELECT id FROM proyect_role WHERE proyect_id = $1 AND name = $2
proyectos.insertProyectRole: INSERT INTO proyect_role (proyect_id, name) VALUES ($1, $2) RETURNING id
proyectos.insertProyectRolePerson: INSERT INTO proyect_role_person (proyect_role_id, person_id) VALUES ($1, $2) RETURNING id
proyectos.memberExists: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM proyect_role_person prp INNER JOIN proyect_role pr ON pr.id = prp.proyect_role_id WHERE pr.proyect_id = $1 AND prp.person_id = $2) AS dup
proyectos.personExists: SELECT person_id FROM person WHERE person_id = $1

model.dropAll: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS proyect_role_person, proyect_role, proyect, person_user, person, charge, projects, project_members, audit, permission_method, permission_option, user_profile, method, option, object, sub_system, subsystem, "user", users, profile, status CASCADE
model.createStatus: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS status (status_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, status_de VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL)
model.createProfile: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profile (profile_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, profile_de VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL)
model.createSubSystem: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sub_system (sub_system_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, sub_system_de VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL)
model.createObject: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS object (object_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, object_de VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, sub_system_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES sub_system(sub_system_id) ON DELETE CASCADE)
model.createMethod: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS method (method_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, method_de VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, object_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES object(object_id) ON DELETE CASCADE)
model.createOption: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS option (option_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, option_de VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, sub_system_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES sub_system(sub_system_id) ON DELETE CASCADE)
model.createUser: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user" (user_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_na VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, user_pw VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, status_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES status(status_id))
model.createUserProfile: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profile (user_profile_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES "user"(user_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE (user_id, profile_id))
model.createPermissionMethod: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_method (permission_method_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, method_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES method(method_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE (profile_id, method_id))
model.createPermissionOption: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_option (permission_option_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, option_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES option(option_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE (profile_id, option_id))
model.createAudit: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES "user"(user_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, date DATE NOT NULL, hour TIME NOT NULL, action VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, description TEXT)
model.createCharge: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS charge (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL)
model.createPerson: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS person (person_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, person_ci VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, person_na VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, person_ln VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, charge_id INT REFERENCES charge(id))
model.createPersonUser: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS person_user (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, person_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES person(person_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, user_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES "user"(user_id) ON DELETE CASCADE)
model.createProyect: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS proyect (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, status_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES status(status_id), name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL)
model.createProyectRole: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS proyect_role (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, proyect_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES proyect(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL)
model.createProyectRolePerson: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS proyect_role_person (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, proyect_role_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES proyect_role(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, person_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES person(person_id) ON DELETE CASCADE)
model.loadPermissionMethod: SELECT pm.profile_id, m.method_de, o.object_de, s.sub_system_de FROM permission_method pm INNER JOIN method m ON m.method_id = pm.method_id INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = m.object_id INNER JOIN sub_system s ON s.sub_system_id = o.sub_system_id
model.loadPermissionOption: SELECT po.profile_id, op.option_de FROM permission_option po INNER JOIN option op ON op.option_id = po.option_id
model.insertUserProfile: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (user_id, profile_id) DO NOTHING
model.insertAudit: INSERT INTO audit (user_id, date, hour, action, description) VALUES ($1, CURRENT_DATE, LOCALTIME, $2, $3)
